title: Outdoor Classic Olive Planter | Ceramic Look Round Plastic Flower Pot With Glossy Finish | Frost & UV Resistant Traditional Garden Plant Pot| Dia: 40cm, 50cm & Square | Grey (1, 50cm XL Round)
features: TRADITIONAL DESIGN - With the sleek, classic aesthetic, these planters add a stylish, on-trend look to any garden, balcony, or outdoor/indoor space. Our Olive planters showcase a timeless pattern and a charming hand-painted grey finish.
MADE FROM RECYCLED PLASTICS - These planters are crafted from environmentally friendly, recycled plastics, helping reduce waste while offering a sustainable choice for your garden.
WEATHERPROOF AND DURABLE - Designed to withstand all elements, our garden pots are both UV-protected and frost-resistant, ensuring it stays in excellent condition through any season.
LIGHTWEIGHT AND EASY TO MANOEUVRE - The planters lightweight construction makes it easy to move around, allowing you to rearrange or relocate it with minimal effort.
DIMENSIONS: Medium - Dia:40cm x H:40cm 34lt, Extra Large - Dia:55cm x H:52cm 75lt, Square -
description: Our stunning Olive planters feature a distinctive modern design which will make a stylish addition to your garden, balcony, or indoor space; perfect for small shrubs and plants. Crafted from recycled, heavy-duty polypropylene, they offers durability and strength while remaining lightweight for easy handling. UV-protected and frost-resistant, these planters are built to endure all weather conditions and designed for use year after year. The Olive planters showcase a timeless pattern and a charming hand-painted, soft grey finish.
